scriptDesc: Install VLC media player via Chocolatey and repair file associations (drops --one-instance, retargets stale 32-bit registry pointers).

messages.notFound: VLC not found -- installing via Chocolatey
messages.verifyFailed: Install completed but vlc.exe was not found in expected locations
messages.repairDisabled: Association repair disabled in config -- skipping
messages.reinstallStart: Performing full VLC reinstall (uninstall + fresh install + association repair)...

commands.repair: Repair VLC file associations only (no install)
commands.reinstall: Full reinstall: uninstall + fresh install + association repair
